sentiment: The things we build to outlast us become more precious the more the world proves permanence is an illusion.

stories.title: Project Gutenberg – keeps getting better
stories.summary: The quiet persistence of free knowledge — Project Gutenberg quietly improving, proving old institutions built on generosity still compound.

stories.title: SQL patterns I use to catch transaction fraud
stories.summary: Pattern recognition as defense — the humbling work of watching for what doesn't belong, over and over.

stories.title: Ploopy Bean: a trackpoint for every computer
stories.summary: Someone made a trackpoint you can plug into any computer — tactile, small, deliberate. The joy of a well-made tool.
